# Archive bots
User-agent: ia_archiver
User-agent: archive.org_bot
User-agent: special_archiver
User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: FacebookBot
User-agent: Diffbot
User-agent: cohere-ai
User-agent: Google-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: *
Disallow: /assets/
Disallow: /style.css
Disallow: /style-cv.css
